c24856.st: The elder, To [the] chosen lady and her children,

c24859.st: but also all who know the truth —

c24860.st: because of the truth that abides in us

c24861.st: and will be with us forever:

c24862.st: Grace, mercy, [and] peace be with us ... from God [the] Father

c24863.st: in truth and love ... and from Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father.

c24867.st: just as the Father has commanded [us].

c24868.st: And now I urge you, [dear] lady —

c24869.st: not as a new commandment to you,

c24870.st: but [one] we have had from [the] beginning —

c24873.st: that we walk according to His commandments.

c24875.st: very ... you have heard from [the] beginning,

c24877.st: For many deceivers have gone out into the world,

c24878.st: refusing to confess the coming of Jesus Christ in [the] flesh.

c24879.st: Any such [person] is the deceiver and the antichrist.

c24881.st: so that you do not lose what we have worked for,

c24884.st: without remaining in the teaching of Christ does not have God.

c24886.st: has both the Father and the Son.

c24895.st: [but] I would prefer not to use paper and ink.

c24896.st: Instead, I hope to come ... with you

c24898.st: so that our joy may be complete.

c24899.st: The children of your elect sister send you greetings.
